description_long: This object is a nearly perfect sphere composed of a uniform, fine-grained gray stone. Its surface is subtly textured, giving it a slightly rough, matte appearance that diffuses light evenly across its form. The coloration is consistent, with a cool, bluish-gray tone and no visible veining, cracks, or artificial markings. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible seams or joints, suggesting it was either naturally rounded or meticulously shaped. The object is reminiscent of decorative stone spheres often found in urban parks, plazas, or as part of landscape architecture. Its size and mass would make it a significant obstacle or barrier in pedestrian or vehicular pathways.
description: A solid, spherical gray stone with a fine, rough texture and a uniform bluish-gray color. It is dense, heavy, and visually striking, suitable as an urban barrier or decorative feature.
description_view_0: A full, centered view of the stone sphere, showing its even, rough texture and consistent gray coloration.
description_view_1: Another direct view of the sphere, nearly identical to view 0, with no visible distinguishing marks or features.
description_view_2: The sphere remains visually uniform, with the same fine-grained texture and coloration as other views.
description_view_3: This view also shows the stone's consistent surface, with no unique features or patterns visible.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or landscaping
attribute_pattern: Uniform fine-grained texture with no visible veining or artificial patterns; surface is visually consistent throughout.
attribute_weathering: Slightly rough and matte, suggesting moderate exposure to the elements but no significant erosion or biological growth.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically contrasts with paved surfaces or manicured lawns, serving as a visual and physical barrier; may be surrounded by low vegetation or decorative gravel.
